description: Curated local skill baseline for AutoMindLab host/worker operations, runtime diagnostics, and enterprise review work.

local_skills.name: runtime-doctoring
local_skills.why: Inspect host/worker topology, contracts, and runtime health before claiming the runtime is ready.

local_skills.name: host-worker-routing-check
local_skills.why: Verify front-door bindings stay on the host and the worker remains isolated.

local_skills.name: bootstrap-recovery
local_skills.why: Recover seeded workspaces and runtime config after drift or broken bootstrap state.

local_skills.name: workflow-validation
local_skills.why: Keep workflow definitions aligned with the live skill registry and delegation contract.

local_skills.name: operator-surface-review
local_skills.why: Translate operator-facing patterns into typed enterprise manifests and approval policy instead of ad hoc shells.

local_skills.name: agentmail-ops
local_skills.why: Keep runtime-owned email identities, domain routing, and outbound approval boundaries explicit and reviewable.

local_skills.name: browser-validation
local_skills.why: Turn repo changes into proof-oriented browser validation plans for downstream enterprise surfaces.

local_skills.name: diagnostic-consultation
local_skills.why: Run the pump-station consultation flow in a repeatable, contract-safe way.

local_skills.name: council-query
local_skills.why: Use the Council of 13 as a small, explicit reasoning layer instead of a decorative flourish.

local_skills.name: council-review
local_skills.why: Challenge high-impact decisions with a narrow seat mix before final host synthesis.

local_skills.name: memory-capture
local_skills.why: Record validated runtime patterns without turning memory into an unreviewed source of truth.

local_skills.name: escalate-to-human
local_skills.why: Force a safe handoff when uncertainty is high or approval boundaries are crossed.

optional_capabilities.name: github-admin-bridge
optional_capabilities.why: Useful for issue, PR, and repo operations when explicit write approval exists.
optional_capabilities.approval: Require explicit operator intent and repo-visible verification.

optional_capabilities.name: explainable-web-research
optional_capabilities.why: Useful when enterprise research needs sourced evidence rather than ungrounded summaries.
optional_capabilities.approval: Keep access narrow and results operator-visible.

optional_capabilities.name: browser-automation
optional_capabilities.why: Useful only for sanctioned UI verification or workflow replay.
optional_capabilities.approval: Enable only with a documented browser policy and a clear rollback path.

optional_capabilities.name: deep-filesystem-analysis
optional_capabilities.why: Useful for repo-scale diagnostics or migrations that exceed the default file surface.
optional_capabilities.approval: Prefer workspace-scoped access and avoid broad host-level writes.

optional_capabilities.name: curated-skill-bundle-registry
optional_capabilities.why: Useful when multiple enterprise engagements need a stable packaged skill baseline without copying donor skill repos directly.
optional_capabilities.approval: Keep bundle catalogs local, validated, and limited to skills already present in the repo.
